framework.name: Stripe and PayPal at CBA Symposium Table
framework.description: Both Stripe and PayPal participated in the CBA's Fall 2025 Agentic Payments Symposium alongside Mastercard, Google, JPMorgan, Plaid, and Fiserv. Confirms active engagement but reveals no specific product timelines.
framework.raw_quote: Stripe, LLC... PayPal... Mastercard International Incorporated

source.title: Agentic AI Payments: Navigating Consumer Protection, Innovation, ...
